label: 随机矩形区域生成
description: 在输入网格的目标区域内随机摆放若干互不重叠的轴对齐矩形地块，每个地块输出为一张独立的 0/1 网格（1 表示地块覆盖的格子）。targetValue=0 时把'非零格'视为有效区域（即把 1 当作区域特征函数）；非 0 时精确匹配该掩码 ID。
description-en: Randomly places non-overlapping axis-aligned rectangles within a target region of the input grid. Each rectangle is emitted as a separate 0/1 grid (1 marks the cells covered by that rectangle). When targetValue=0, any non-zero cell is treated as valid (i.e. 1 acts as the region's characteristic function); a non-zero targetValue requires exact mask-ID match.
icon: 深色网格底面上散落若干大小不一的白色实心矩形块，矩形严格对齐网格且只出现在有效区域内，扁平插画风格，简洁小图标，主色2种。

inputs.name: grid
inputs.label: 输入网格
inputs.description: 输入二维网格；矩形只能落在有效区域格内。
inputs.description-en: Input 2D grid; rectangles are placed only on valid cells.

inputs.name: targetValue
inputs.label: 目标区域值
inputs.description: 矩形只能放在等于该值的格内。0 表示任意非零格（把 1 视为区域特征函数，二值模式）；非 0 时精确匹配该掩码 ID（适用于异形/多值区域）。
inputs.description-en: Rectangles are placed only on cells equal to this value. 0 treats any non-zero cell as valid (1 as the region's characteristic function, binary mode); a non-zero value requires exact mask-ID match (for irregular / multi-valued regions).

inputs.name: count
inputs.label: 矩形数量
inputs.description: 想要放置的矩形总数；若空间不足，实际数量可能小于此值。
inputs.description-en: Target number of rectangles to place; the actual count may be smaller if space is insufficient.

inputs.name: minSize
inputs.label: 最小宽高
inputs.description: 矩形宽和高的最小值（格数），宽高各自独立随机，共用此下限。
inputs.description-en: Minimum size for both width and height (in cells); width and height are sampled independently within [minSize, maxSize].

inputs.name: maxSize
inputs.label: 最大宽高
inputs.description: 矩形宽和高的最大值（格数）。
inputs.description-en: Maximum size for both width and height (in cells).

inputs.name: minDistance
inputs.label: 最小距离
inputs.description: 相邻矩形最近边之间的最小格数间距，0 表示允许紧靠（但仍不重叠）。
inputs.description-en: Minimum gap (in cells) between the nearest edges of any two placed rectangles; 0 allows touching.

inputs.name: dispersion
inputs.label: 离散程度
inputs.description: 0=随机集中，1=尽量分散。值越大，新矩形越倾向放置在远离已有矩形的位置；非重叠规则始终生效。
inputs.description-en: 0 = random/clustered, 1 = maximally dispersed. Higher values bias new rectangles toward positions far from existing ones; the non-overlap rule always applies.

inputs.name: seed
inputs.label: 随机种子
inputs.description: 随机种子，0 使用当前时间。

outputs.name: outputGridList
outputs.label: 地块网格列表
outputs.description: 每个成功放置的矩形对应一张独立的 0/1 网格（地块覆盖的格子=1，其余=0），与输入网格同形状。
outputs.description-en: One 0/1 grid per successfully placed rectangle (1 marks the cells covered by that tile, 0 elsewhere); shape matches the input grid.

outputs.name: placedCount
outputs.label: 实际放置数量
outputs.description: 成功放置的矩形数量（可能小于目标数量）。
outputs.description-en: Number of rectangles successfully placed (may be less than count).
